summary: Invert guard polarity: advisory-by-default with a strict opt-in
description: The branch-guard.ts header justifies hard exit codes by noting agents follow exit codes better than prose - correct for the agent-author but wrong as a product default across diverse human workflows. Make guards warn by default; a strict / per-ticket project opts back into hard exit codes. Depends on P1 (branch_mode) and P2 (advisory grep) landing first. Files: src/branch-guard.ts, src/commands/close.ts, src/commands/work.ts.

resolution.test_function: refuses to close from the wrong branch under guard_mode=strict
resolution.note: Guards are advisory by default (warn+proceed); guard_mode=strict re-hardens them. Verified advisory vs strict end-to-end. This repo opts into strict to keep its own discipline.
